15637:     function customVehicleBadgeVehicleId(row) {
15638:         if (!row) return '';
15639:         const checkbox = row.matches?.('.vehicle_checkbox')
15640:             ? row
15641:             : row.querySelector?.('.vehicle_checkbox, input[vehicle_id], input[data-vehicle-id], input[data-vehicle_id]');
15642:         const resolved = missionRequirementsVehicleId(checkbox || row);
15643:         if (Number.isFinite(Number(resolved)) && Number(resolved) >= 0) return String(Number(resolved));
15644:         const link = row.matches?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') ? row : row.querySelector?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]');
15645:         const match = String(link?.getAttribute?.('href') || link?.href || '').match(/\/vehicles\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/u);
15646:         return match?.[1] || '';
15647:     }
15648: 
15649:     function customVehicleBadgeRows(doc) {
15650:         const rows = new Set();
15651:         let nodes = [];
15652:         try { nodes = Array.from(doc?.querySelectorAll?.(CUSTOM_VEHICLE_AVAILABLE_SELECTOR) || []); } catch (err) {}
15653:         for (const node of nodes) {
15654:             const row = node?.closest?.(CUSTOM_VEHICLE_ROW_SELECTOR) || node?.parentElement || node;
15655:             if (row) rows.add(row);
15656:         }
15657:         return Array.from(rows);

22216: 
22217:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
22218:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
22219:     }
22220: 
22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
22224:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
22225:     }
22226: 
22227:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
22228:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
22229:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
22230:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
22231:     }
22232: 

--- lines 22211-22236 ---
22211:         { key: 'search-technicians', label: 'Search Technicians', aliases: ['Search Technician', 'Search Technicians'], group: 'staff', types: [86, 87, 92, 93, 99, 101, 102] },
22212:         { key: 'water-resource', label: 'Water', aliases: ['Water', 'litres of water', 'liters of water'], group: 'other', bar: 'water' },
22213:         { key: 'foam-resource', label: 'Foam', aliases: ['Foam', 'litres of foam', 'liters of foam'], group: 'other', bar: 'foam' },
22214:         { key: 'pump-resource', label: 'Pumping Capacity', aliases: ['l/min pumping process', 'l/min pumping capacity', 'Pumping Capacity'], group: 'other', bar: 'pump' }
22215:     ].map(definition => Object.freeze({ group: 'vehicles', aliases: [], types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, ...definition })));
22216: 
22217:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
22218:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
22219:     }
22220: 
22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
22224:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
22225:     }
22226: 
22227:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
22228:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
22229:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
22230:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
22231:     }
22232: 
22233:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
22234:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
22235:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
22236:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;

--- lines 22217-22242 ---
22217:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
22218:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
22219:     }
22220: 
22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
22224:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
22225:     }
22226: 
22227:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
22228:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
22229:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
22230:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
22231:     }
22232: 
22233:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
22234:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
22235:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
22236:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;
22237:         const exact = known === true ? true : known === false ? false : safeMax !== null && safeMin === safeMax;
22238:         return { min: safeMin, max: safeMax, known: exact, value: safeMin };
22239:     }

22243:         if (value.known || value.max === value.min) return value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB');
22244:         if (value.max === null) return value.min > 0 ? `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}+` : '?';
22245:         return `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}–${value.max.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`;

22330:         `${prefix}\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${numberPattern}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?(${labelPattern})${suffix}`,

22319:     function missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(text, definition) {
22320:         const aliases = Array.from(new Set([definition.label, ...(definition.aliases || [])]))
22321:         .filter(Boolean)
22322:         .sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length)
22323:         .map(missionRequirementsEscapeRegex);
22324:         if (!aliases.length) return null;
22325:         const numberPattern = '(\\d{1,3}(?:[\\s,.]\\d{3})*|\\d+)';
22326:         const labelPattern = aliases.join('|');
22327:         const prefix = '(^|[,;]\\s*)';
22328:         const suffix = '(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))';
22329:         const before = new RegExp(
22330:         `${prefix}\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${numberPattern}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?(${labelPattern})${suffix}`,
22331:             'iu'
22332:         );
22333:         const after = new RegExp(
22334:         `${prefix}\\s*(${labelPattern})\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${numberPattern}${suffix}`,
22335:             'iu'
22336:         );
22337:         const beforeMatch = before.exec(text);
22338:         const afterMatch = after.exec(text);

--- lines 22333-22358 ---
22333:         const after = new RegExp(
22334:         `${prefix}\\s*(${labelPattern})\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${numberPattern}${suffix}`,
22335:             'iu'
22336:         );
22337:         const beforeMatch = before.exec(text);
22338:         const afterMatch = after.exec(text);
22339:         const candidates = [];
22340:         if (beforeMatch) candidates.push({
22341:         index: beforeMatch.index,
22342:         length: beforeMatch[0].length,
22343:         missing: missionRequirementsNumber(beforeMatch[2]),
22344:         label: beforeMatch[3]
22345:         });
22346:         if (afterMatch) candidates.push({
22347:         index: afterMatch.index,
22348:         length: afterMatch[0].length,
22349:         missing: missionRequirementsNumber(afterMatch[3]),
22350:         label: afterMatch[2]
22351:         });
22352:         return candidates.sort((a, b) => a.index - b.index || b.length - a.length)[0] || null;
22353:     }

22354: 
22355:     function missionRequirementsParseText(rawText, group = 'vehicles') {
22356:         const normalized = String(rawText ?? '')
22357:         .replace(/\r/g, '')
22358:         .replace(/\n+/g, '; ')
22359:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22360:         .trim();
22361:         if (!normalized) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22362:         let working = normalized;
22363:         const requirements = [];
22364:         while (true) {
22365:         let best = null;
22366:         for (const definition of MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS) {
22367:             if ((definition.group || 'vehicles') !== group) continue;
22368:             const found = missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(working, definition);
22369:             if (!found) continue;
22370:             if (!best || found.index < best.found.index || (found.index === best.found.index && found.length > best.found.length)) {

--- lines 22358-22383 ---
22358:         .replace(/\n+/g, '; ')
22359:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22360:         .trim();

22362:         let working = normalized;
22363:         const requirements = [];
22364:         while (true) {
22365:         let best = null;
22366:         for (const definition of MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS) {
22367:             if ((definition.group || 'vehicles') !== group) continue;
22368:             const found = missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(working, definition);
22369:             if (!found) continue;
22370:             if (!best || found.index < best.found.index || (found.index === best.found.index && found.length > best.found.length)) {
22371:                 best = { definition, found };
22372:             }
22373:         }
22374:         if (!best) break;
22375:         requirements.push({
22376:             key: best.definition.key,
22377:             requirement: best.definition.label,
22378:             missing: best.found.missing,
22379:             group,
22380:             definition: best.definition,
22381:             sourceIndex: best.found.index
22382:         });
22383:         working = `${working.slice(0, best.found.index)}${' '.repeat(best.found.length)}${working.slice(best.found.index + best.found.length)}`;

--- lines 22377-22402 ---

22378:             missing: best.found.missing,
22379:             group,
22380:             definition: best.definition,
22381:             sourceIndex: best.found.index
22382:         });
22383:         working = `${working.slice(0, best.found.index)}${' '.repeat(best.found.length)}${working.slice(best.found.index + best.found.length)}`;
22384:         }
22385:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22386:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22387:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22388:     }

22390:     function missionRequirementsElementText(element) {
22391:         if (!element) return '';
22392:         const rendered = typeof element.innerText === 'string' && element.innerText.trim()
22393:         ? element.innerText
22394:         : element.textContent;
22395:         return String(rendered || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').trim();
22396:     }

22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';

22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }

--- lines 22396-22421 ---
22396:     }
22397: 
22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }

22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;

22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')

22418:         .trim();

22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {

--- lines 22411-22436 ---
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }

22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();
22434:         if (!sectionText) return;
22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });

--- lines 22416-22441 ---
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();

22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });
22437:         return sections;
22438:     }

22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();
22434:         if (!sectionText) return;
22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });
22437:         return sections;
22438:     }

22439: 
22440:     function missionRequirementsParseGenericText(rawText, group) {
22441:         let working = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').replace(/\n+/g, '; ').trim();
22442:         if (!working) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22443:         const number = '(\\d{1,3}(?:[\\s,.]\\d{3})*|\\d+)';
22444:         const patterns = [
22445:         {
22446:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${number}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?\\s+([^,;]+?)(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22447:             quantity: 2,
22448:             label: 3
22449:         },
22450:         {
22451:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*([^,;:]+?)\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${number}(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22452:             quantity: 3,
22453:             label: 2
22454:         }
22455:         ];

--- lines 22452-22477 ---
22452:             quantity: 3,
22453:             label: 2
22454:         }
22455:         ];
22456:         const requirements = [];
22457:         let serial = 0;
22458:         for (const pattern of patterns) {
22459:         pattern.expression.lastIndex = 0;
22460:         let match;
22461:         while ((match = pattern.expression.exec(working))) {
22462:             const missing = missionRequirementsNumber(match[pattern.quantity]);
22463:             const label = String(match[pattern.label] || '')
22464:                 .replace(/^\s*(?:and\s+)?(?:missing|required)\s+/iu, '')
22465:                 .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22466:                 .trim();
22467:             if (!missing || !label) continue;
22468:             const sourceIndex = match.index;
22469:             const slug = label.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').slice(0, 48) || 'requirement';
22470:             requirements.push({
22471:                 key: `unmapped-${slug}-${serial++}`,
22472:                 requirement: label,
22473:                 missing,
22474:                 group,
22475:                 definition: { key: `unmapped-${slug}`, label, aliases: [label], group, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false, generic: true },
22476:                 sourceIndex
22477:             });

--- lines 22474-22499 ---
22474:                 group,
22475:                 definition: { key: `unmapped-${slug}`, label, aliases: [label], group, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false, generic: true },
22476:                 sourceIndex
22477:             });
22478:             working = `${working.slice(0, sourceIndex)}${' '.repeat(match[0].length)}${working.slice(sourceIndex + match[0].length)}`;
22479:             pattern.expression.lastIndex = sourceIndex + match[0].length;
22480:         }
22481:         }
22482:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22483:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22484:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22485:     }

22492:         const cleaned = missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(rawText);
22493:         if (!cleaned) return;
22494:         const parsed = missionRequirementsParseText(cleaned, group);
22495:         requirements.push(...parsed.requirements);
22496:         const generic = missionRequirementsParseGenericText(parsed.remaining, group);
22497:         requirements.push(...generic.requirements);
22498:         if (generic.remaining) unresolved.push({ group, text: generic.remaining });
22499:         };

22477:             });

22480:         }
22481:         }
22482:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22483:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });

22520:     // Issue #181: patient-derived ambulance demand.
22521:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS = 1400; const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT = 32; const missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots = new Map(); function missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate) { const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount; const scopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelector))); let patientText = null; let patientForm = null; for (const scope of scopes) { if (!patientText) patientText = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_text') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text'); if (!patientForm) patientForm = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_form') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_form'); if (patientText && patientForm) break; } const holder = patientText || patientForm; if (!holder) return { present: false, known: true, count: 0, source: 'absent', text: '' }; const attributeNames = ['data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count']; for (const scope of Array.from(new Set([patientText, patientForm].filter(Boolean)))) { for (const name of attributeNames) { const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope?.getAttribute?.(name)); if (value !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: value, source: name, text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } for (const value of [scope?.dataset?.patientCount, scope?.dataset?.patientTotal, scope?.dataset?.patients]) { const parsed = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value); if (parsed !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: parsed, source: 'dataset', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } } const strong = patientText?.querySelector?.('strong') || patientForm?.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text strong, strong') || null; const parseTotal = value => { const match = String(value || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').match(/\b(\d{1,3}(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)\s+patients?\b/iu); return match ? missionRequirementsNumber(match[1]) : null; }; const strongCount = parseTotal(missionRequirementsElementText(strong)); if (strongCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: strongCount, source: 'patient-total-strong', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; const text = missionRequirementsElementText(holder); const textCount = parseTotal(text); if (textCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: textCount, source: 'patient-summary-text', text }; return { present: true, known: false, count: null, source: 'patient-summary-unresolved', text }; } function missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now = Date.now()) { for (const [key, snapshot] of missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots) { if (now - (Number(snapshot?.updatedAt) || 0) > 60000) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } if (missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) return; const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.entries()) .sort((left, right) => (Number(left[1]?.updatedAt) || 0) - (Number(right[1]?.updatedAt) || 0)); for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size - MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)) { missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } } function missionRequirementsPatientState(record, now = Date.now()) { const candidate = record?.candidate || record; const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, record?.source || candidate?.source); const current = missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate); const key = missionIdentity > 0 ? String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }
22522: 
22523:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {
22524:         const scopes = [];

--- lines 22502-22527 ---
22502:         const groupElements = allGroups.filter(element => {
22503:         const closest = element.closest?.('#missing_text');
22504:         return !closest || closest === source;
22505:         });
22506:         if (groupElements.length) {
22507:         for (const element of groupElements) {
22508:             const rawGroup = element.getAttribute?.('data-requirement-type') || element.dataset?.requirementType || 'vehicles';
22509:             parseSection(missionRequirementsElementText(element), rawGroup);
22510:         }
22511:         } else {
22512:         const raw = missionRequirementsElementText(source);
22513:         for (const section of missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(raw, 'vehicles')) parseSection(section.text, section.group);
22514:         }
22515:         return { requirements, unresolved };
22516:     }

22521:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS = 1400; const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT = 32; const missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots = new Map(); function missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate) { const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount; const scopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelector))); let patientText = null; let patientForm = null; for (const scope of scopes) { if (!patientText) patientText = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_text') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text'); if (!patientForm) patientForm = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_form') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_form'); if (patientText && patientForm) break; } const holder = patientText || patientForm; if (!holder) return { present: false, known: true, count: 0, source: 'absent', text: '' }; const attributeNames = ['data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count']; for (const scope of Array.from(new Set([patientText, patientForm].filter(Boolean)))) { for (const name of attributeNames) { const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope?.getAttribute?.(name)); if (value !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: value, source: name, text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } for (const value of [scope?.dataset?.patientCount, scope?.dataset?.patientTotal, scope?.dataset?.patients]) { const parsed = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value); if (parsed !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: parsed, source: 'dataset', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } } const strong = patientText?.querySelector?.('strong') || patientForm?.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text strong, strong') || null; const parseTotal = value => { const match = String(value || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').match(/\b(\d{1,3}(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)\s+patients?\b/iu); return match ? missionRequirementsNumber(match[1]) : null; }; const strongCount = parseTotal(missionRequirementsElementText(strong)); if (strongCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: strongCount, source: 'patient-total-strong', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; const text = missionRequirementsElementText(holder); const textCount = parseTotal(text); if (textCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: textCount, source: 'patient-summary-text', text }; return { present: true, known: false, count: null, source: 'patient-summary-unresolved', text }; } function missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now = Date.now()) { for (const [key, snapshot] of missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots) { if (now - (Number(snapshot?.updatedAt) || 0) > 60000) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } if (missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) return; const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.entries()) .sort((left, right) => (Number(left[1]?.updatedAt) || 0) - (Number(right[1]?.updatedAt) || 0)); for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size - MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)) { missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } } function missionRequirementsPatientState(record, now = Date.now()) { const candidate = record?.candidate || record; const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, record?.source || candidate?.source); const current = missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate); const key = missionIdentity > 0 ? String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }
22522: 
22523:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {
22524:         const scopes = [];
22525:         const addScope = scope => {
22526:         if (scope && !scopes.includes(scope)) scopes.push(scope);
22527:         };

--- lines 22503-22528 ---
22503:         const closest = element.closest?.('#missing_text');
22504:         return !closest || closest === source;
22505:         });
22506:         if (groupElements.length) {
22507:         for (const element of groupElements) {
22508:             const rawGroup = element.getAttribute?.('data-requirement-type') || element.dataset?.requirementType || 'vehicles';
22509:             parseSection(missionRequirementsElementText(element), rawGroup);
22510:         }
22511:         } else {
22512:         const raw = missionRequirementsElementText(source);
22513:         for (const section of missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(raw, 'vehicles')) parseSection(section.text, section.group);
22514:         }
22515:         return { requirements, unresolved };
22516:     }

22520:     // Issue #181: patient-derived ambulance demand.
22521:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS = 1400; const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT = 32; const missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots = new Map(); function missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate) { const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount; const scopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelector))); let patientText = null; let patientForm = null; for (const scope of scopes) { if (!patientText) patientText = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_text') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text'); if (!patientForm) patientForm = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_form') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_form'); if (patientText && patientForm) break; } const holder = patientText || patientForm; if (!holder) return { present: false, known: true, count: 0, source: 'absent', text: '' }; const attributeNames = ['data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count']; for (const scope of Array.from(new Set([patientText, patientForm].filter(Boolean)))) { for (const name of attributeNames) { const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope?.getAttribute?.(name)); if (value !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: value, source: name, text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } for (const value of [scope?.dataset?.patientCount, scope?.dataset?.patientTotal, scope?.dataset?.patients]) { const parsed = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value); if (parsed !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: parsed, source: 'dataset', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } } const strong = patientText?.querySelector?.('strong') || patientForm?.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text strong, strong') || null; const parseTotal = value => { const match = String(value || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').match(/\b(\d{1,3}(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)\s+patients?\b/iu); return match ? missionRequirementsNumber(match[1]) : null; }; const strongCount = parseTotal(missionRequirementsElementText(strong)); if (strongCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: strongCount, source: 'patient-total-strong', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; const text = missionRequirementsElementText(holder); const textCount = parseTotal(text); if (textCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: textCount, source: 'patient-summary-text', text }; return { present: true, known: false, count: null, source: 'patient-summary-unresolved', text }; } function missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now = Date.now()) { for (const [key, snapshot] of missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots) { if (now - (Number(snapshot?.updatedAt) || 0) > 60000) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } if (missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) return; const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.entries()) .sort((left, right) => (Number(left[1]?.updatedAt) || 0) - (Number(right[1]?.updatedAt) || 0)); for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size - MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)) { missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } } function missionRequirementsPatientState(record, now = Date.now()) { const candidate = record?.candidate || record; const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, record?.source || candidate?.source); const current = missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate); const key = missionIdentity > 0 ? String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }

scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text'); if (!patientForm) patientForm = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_form') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_form'); if (patientText && patientForm) break; } const holder = patientText || patientForm; if (!holder) return { present: false, known: true, count: 0, source: 'absent', text: '' }; const attributeNames = ['data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count']; for (const scope of Array.from(new Set([patientText, patientForm].filter(Boolean)))) { for (const name of attributeNames) { const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope?.getAttribute?.(name)); if (value !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: value, source: name, text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } for (const value of [scope?.dataset?.patientCount, scope?.dataset?.patientTotal, scope?.dataset?.patients]) { const parsed = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value); if (parsed !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: parsed, source: 'dataset', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } } const strong = patientText?.querySelector?.('strong') || patientForm?.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text strong, strong') || null; const parseTotal = value => { const match = String(value || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').match(/\b(\d{1,3}(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)\s+patients?\b/iu); return match ? missionRequirementsNumber(match[1]) : null; }; const strongCount = parseTotal(missionRequirementsElementText(strong)); if (strongCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: strongCount, source: 'patient-total-strong', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; const text = missionRequirementsElementText(holder); const textCount = parseTotal(text); if (textCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: textCount, source: 'patient-summary-text', text }; return { present: true, known: false, count: null, source: 'patient-summary-unresolved', text }; } function missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now = Date.now()) { for (const [key, snapshot] of missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots) { if (now - (Number(snapshot?.updatedAt) || 0) > 60000) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } if (missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) return; const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.entries()) .sort((left, right) => (Number(left[1]?.updatedAt) || 0) - (Number(right[1]?.updatedAt) || 0)); for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size - MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)) { missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } } function missionRequirementsPatientState(record, now = Date.now()) { const candidate = record?.candidate || record; const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, record?.source || candidate?.source); const current = missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate); const key = missionIdentity > 0 ? String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }

22523:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {

22532:         scope?.getAttribute?.('vehicle_type_id')

String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }

22521:     const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS = 1400; const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT = 32; const missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots = new Map(); function missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate) { const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount; const scopes = Array.from(new Set([root, candidate?.mount].filter(scope => scope?.querySelector))); let patientText = null; let patientForm = null; for (const scope of scopes) { if (!patientText) patientText = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_text') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text'); if (!patientForm) patientForm = scope.matches?.('#patient_button_form') ? scope : scope.querySelector?.('#patient_button_form'); if (patientText && patientForm) break; } const holder = patientText || patientForm; if (!holder) return { present: false, known: true, count: 0, source: 'absent', text: '' }; const attributeNames = ['data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count']; for (const scope of Array.from(new Set([patientText, patientForm].filter(Boolean)))) { for (const name of attributeNames) { const value = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(scope?.getAttribute?.(name)); if (value !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: value, source: name, text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } for (const value of [scope?.dataset?.patientCount, scope?.dataset?.patientTotal, scope?.dataset?.patients]) { const parsed = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value); if (parsed !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: parsed, source: 'dataset', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; } } const strong = patientText?.querySelector?.('strong') || patientForm?.querySelector?.('#patient_button_text strong, strong') || null; const parseTotal = value => { const match = String(value || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').match(/\b(\d{1,3}(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)\s+patients?\b/iu); return match ? missionRequirementsNumber(match[1]) : null; }; const strongCount = parseTotal(missionRequirementsElementText(strong)); if (strongCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: strongCount, source: 'patient-total-strong', text: missionRequirementsElementText(holder) }; const text = missionRequirementsElementText(holder); const textCount = parseTotal(text); if (textCount !== null) return { present: true, known: true, count: textCount, source: 'patient-summary-text', text }; return { present: true, known: false, count: null, source: 'patient-summary-unresolved', text }; } function missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now = Date.now()) { for (const [key, snapshot] of missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots) { if (now - (Number(snapshot?.updatedAt) || 0) > 60000) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } if (missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) return; const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.entries()) .sort((left, right) => (Number(left[1]?.updatedAt) || 0) - (Number(right[1]?.updatedAt) || 0)); for (const [key] of ordered.slice(0, missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.size - MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)) { missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); } } function missionRequirementsPatientState(record, now = Date.now()) { const candidate = record?.candidate || record; const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, record?.source || candidate?.source); const current = missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate); const key = missionIdentity > 0 ? String(missionIdentity) : ''; if (current.present) { if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; if (key) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.set(key, { state: { ...current }, updatedAt: now }); missionRequirementsPatientSnapshotPrune(now); return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } const snapshot = key ? missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? index : -1).filter(index => index >= 0); const statedRows = ambulanceIndexes.map(index => requirements[index]); const statedMissing = statedRows.reduce((maximum, requirement) => Math.max(maximum, Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0)), 0); const patientPresent = patientState?.present === true || patientState?.transitional === true; const patientKnown = patientState?.known === true && Number.isFinite(Number(patientState?.count)); const patientCount = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(patientState.count) || 0) : null; if (!patientPresent && patientCount === 0) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (patientKnown && patientCount === 0 && !statedRows.length) return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; if (statedRows.length) { for (const index of ambulanceIndexes.slice(1).reverse()) requirements.splice(index, 1); } const index = ambulanceIndexes.length ? ambulanceIndexes[0] : requirements.length; const base = statedRows[0] || { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: patientCount ?? 0, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }; const row = { ...base, missing: statedRows.length ? statedMissing : (patientCount ?? 0), group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition, patientDerived: true, patientCountKnown: patientKnown, patientRequired: patientCount, statedRequirement: statedRows.length > 0, requirementSource: 'Patients' }; if (index < requirements.length) requirements[index] = row; else requirements.push(row); if (!patientKnown && !unresolved.some(item => item?.patientDerived)) { unresolved.push({ group: 'vehicles', text: 'Patient total is present but could not be determined.', patientDerived: true }); } return { requirements, unresolved, patientState }; }

22532:         scope?.getAttribute?.('vehicle_type_id')

22543:         if (nestedType !== null && nestedType >= 0) return nestedType;
22544:         }
22545:         return -1;

22548:     function missionRequirementsVehicleId(element) {
22549:         const scopes = Array.from(new Set([element, element?.closest?.('tr')].filter(Boolean)));
22550:         const attributes = ['vehicle_id', 'data-vehicle-id', 'data-vehicle_id'];
22551:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22552:         for (const raw of [scope?.value, scope?.getAttribute?.('value'), scope?.dataset?.vehicleId, scope?.dataset?.vehicle_id]) {
22553:             const value = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
22554:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22555:         }
22556:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
22557:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope?.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
22558:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22559:         }
22560:         const idMatch = String(scope?.id || '').match(/(?:^|[_-])vehicle[_-]?(\d+)(?:$|[_-])/iu);
22561:         if (idMatch) return Number(idMatch[1]);
22562:         const link = scope?.matches?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') ? scope : scope?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]');
22563:         const hrefMatch = String(link?.getAttribute?.('href') || link?.href || '').match(/\/vehicles\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/u);

22565:         }
22566:         return -1;

22941:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePrune() {
22942:         if (missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) return;
22943:         const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.entries()).sort((a, b) => (a[1]?.touchedAt || 0) - (b[1]?.touchedAt || 0));
22944:         while (ordered.length && missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size > MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) {
22945:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(ordered.shift()[0]);
22946:         }

26992:     function applyFinancialRulePayload(payload, { cache = false } = {}) {
26993:         if (!payload || Number(payload.schema) !== 1 || !Array.isArray(payload.rules)) return false;
26994:         const rules = payload.rules.map(validateFinancialRule).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 250);
26995:         if (!rules.length) return false;

26999:             if (!raw || typeof raw !== 'object') continue;

27001:             fallbacks[direction] = {

27000:             const group = FINANCE_ACCOUNTING_GROUPS.has(raw.accountingGroup) ? raw.accountingGroup : fallbacks[direction].accountingGroup;
27001:             fallbacks[direction] = {
27002:                 id: `remote-fallback-${direction}`,
27003:                 key: String(raw.key || fallbacks[direction].key).slice(0, 80),
27004:                 label: String(raw.label || fallbacks[direction].label).slice(0, 120),
27005:                 accountingGroup: group,
27006:                 missionType: String(raw.missionType || '').slice(0, 40),

27008:             };
27009:         }

27011:         activeFinancialFallbacks = fallbacks;
27012:         activeFinancialRuleVersion = String(payload.version || 'remote').slice(0, 80);
27013:         if (cache) gmSetValueSafe(SCRIPT.financeRulesCacheState, JSON.stringify({ fetchedAt: Date.now(), payload }));
27014:         return true;
27015:     }

27017:     function loadCachedFinancialRules() {
27018:         const raw = gmGetValueSafe(SCRIPT.financeRulesCacheState, '');
27019:         let cache = null;
27020:         try { cache = typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw; } catch (err) {}
27021:         if (!cache?.payload || !applyFinancialRulePayload(cache.payload)) return 0;

28022:     function buildFinancialBuckets(transactions, startMs, endMs) {
28023:         const duration = Math.max(1, endMs - startMs);
28024:         const useHourly = duration <= 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
28025:         const targetBuckets = useHourly ? 12 : duration <= 31 * 86400000 ? 31 : 24;
28026:         const unitMs = useHourly ? 60 * 60 * 1000 : 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
28027:         const bucketMs = Math.max(unitMs, Math.ceil(duration / targetBuckets / unitMs) * unitMs);
28028:         const count = Math.max(1, Math.min(targetBuckets, Math.ceil(duration / bucketMs)));
28029:         const buckets = Array.from({ length: count }, (_, index) => ({

17035:     function transportSweepRootScore(root, missionId = null) {
17036:         if (!root || !root.isConnected) return -1;
17037:         const anchors = transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root);
17038:         if (!anchors.length) return -1;
17039:         let score = anchors.length * 10;
17040:         const text = String(root.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
17041:         if (/mission|incident|einsatz|call/.test(text)) score += 15;
17042:         if (/patient|transport|ambulance|discharge/.test(text)) score += 30;
17043:         if (missionId !== null) {
17044:             try {
17045:                 if (root.querySelector(`a[href*="/missions/${missionId}"]`)) score += 80;
17046:             } catch (err) {}
17047:         }
17048:         const rect = root.getBoundingClientRect();
17049:         score += Math.min(30, Math.round((rect.width * rect.height) / 50000));
17050:         return score;
17051:     }

23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);

23174:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23175:         let current = node;
23176:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23177:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;
23178:     }

23181:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23182:         let current = node;
23183:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23184:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;

01702:         const clean = String(key ?? '').replace(/[_-]+/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase();

01704:         vehicle: 'VEHICLES',

01707:         staff: 'PERSONNEL',

01711:         prisoner: 'PRISONERS',

01714:         other: 'OTHER'
01715:         };
01716:         return labels[clean] || clean.replace(/\b\w/g, char => char.toUpperCase());
01717:     }

01740: 
01741:     function formatMissingRequirementObject(value) {
01742:         if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) return '';
01743:         const priority = ['vehicles', 'vehicle', 'personnel', 'staff', 'people', 'patients', 'patient', 'prisoners', 'prisoner', 'transport', 'other'];
01744:         const entries = Object.entries(value).sort(([keyA], [keyB]) => {
01745:         const a = priority.indexOf(String(keyA).toLowerCase());
01746:         const b = priority.indexOf(String(keyB).toLowerCase());
01747:         return (a < 0 ? priority.length : a) - (b < 0 ? priority.length : b);
01748:         });
01749:         return entries
01750:         .map(([key, rawValue]) => {
01751:             const formatted = missingRequirementValueText(rawValue);
01752:             return formatted ? `${missingRequirementKeyLabel(key)}: ${formatted}` : '';
01753:         })
01754:         .filter(Boolean)
01755:         .join(' • ');
01756:     }

17886:     function parseCountedRequirement(value) {
17887:         const clean = String(value || '').replace(/^[-–—\s]+/, '').trim();
17888:         const match = clean.match(/^(\d+)\s*(?:x|×)?\s+(.+)$/i);
17889:         if (match) return { count: Math.max(1, Number(match[1]) || 1), name: match[2].replace(/[.!]+$/, '').trim() };
17890:         if (clean) return { count: 1, name: clean.replace(/[.!]+$/, '').trim() };
17891:         return null;
17892:     }

17895:         const raw = normaliseMissingRequirementText(snapshot?.missingText);
17896:         const result = { raw, vehicles: [], personnel: [], other: [] };
17897:         if (!raw) return result;
17898:         const labelled = /\b(?:vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:/i.test(raw);
17899:         if (labelled) {
17900:         const sectionPattern = /\b(vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\s*•?\s*\b(?:vehicles?|personnel|other)\s*:|$)/gi;
17901:         let section;
17902:         while ((section = sectionPattern.exec(raw))) {

17933:     function requirementSearchParts(name) {
17934:         const original = String(name || '');
17935:         const acronyms = Array.from(original.matchAll(/\(([A-Z0-9-]{2,12})\)/g)).map(match => normaliseSearchText(match[1]));
17936:         const cleaned = normaliseSearchText(original.replace(/\([^)]*\)/g, ' '));
17937:         const stop = new Set(['vehicle', 'vehicles', 'unit', 'units', 'the', 'and', 'with', 'required', 'needed', 'personnel']);
17938:         const tokens = cleaned.split(' ').filter(token => token.length > 1 && !stop.has(token)).map(resourceSearchToken).filter(Boolean);
17939:         return { cleaned, acronyms, tokens };
17940:     }

22220: 
22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);

--- lines 22390-22415 ---
22390:     function missionRequirementsElementText(element) {
22391:         if (!element) return '';
22392:         const rendered = typeof element.innerText === 'string' && element.innerText.trim()
22393:         ? element.innerText
22394:         : element.textContent;
22395:         return String(rendered || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').trim();
22396:     }
22397: 
22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }
22414: 
22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {

--- lines 22398-22423 ---
22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }
22414: 
22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')

22418:         .trim();

--- lines 22407-22432 ---
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }

22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;

22414: 
22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();
22434:         if (!sectionText) return;
22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });
22437:         return sections;
22438:     }

22602:         }

22876:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(doc, descriptor = {}) {
22877:         if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) throw new Error('catalogue document unavailable');
22878:         const requirements = [];
22879:         const unresolved = [];
