22883:         for (const table of tables) {
22884:             const tableText = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(table);
22885:             let kind = /Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements/iu.test(tableText) ? 'requirements'
22886:                 : /Reward\s+and\s+Precondition/iu.test(tableText) ? 'preconditions'
22887:                     : /Other\s+information/iu.test(tableText) ? 'other' : null;
22888:             const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll?.('tr') || []);
22889:             for (const row of rows) {
22890:                 const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll?.('th, td') || []);
22891:                 if (cells.length < 2) continue;
22892:                 const label = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[0]);
22893:                 const value = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[1]);

22896:                 if (kind === 'requirements') {
22897:                     const parsed = missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value);
22898:                     if (parsed) requirements.push(parsed);
22899:                     else unresolved.push({ label, value });
22900:                 } else if (kind === 'preconditions') {

23692:         if (!record) {
23693:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source);

00123:     function readAllianceBuildingsMapPreferenceEarly() {

00766: 
00767:     function runtimeFetch(input, init = {}) {
00768:         if (runtime.destroyed) return Promise.reject(new Error('Toolkit runtime stopped.'));
00769:         const Controller = pageWindow.AbortController || globalThis.AbortController;
00770:         const controller = typeof Controller === 'function' ? new Controller() : null;
00771:         if (controller) runtime.fetchControllers.add(controller);
00772:         const fetchFunction = pageWindow.fetch || globalThis.fetch;
00773:         if (typeof fetchFunction !== 'function') {
00774:         if (controller) runtime.fetchControllers.delete(controller);
00775:         return Promise.reject(new Error('Browser fetch is unavailable.'));
00776:         }
00777:         const options = controller ? { ...init, signal: controller.signal } : init;
00778:         return Promise.resolve(fetchFunction.call(pageWindow, input, options))
00779:         .finally(() => { if (controller) runtime.fetchControllers.delete(controller); });
00780:     }

27539:     async function fetchSameOriginDocument(pathOrUrl) {

27541:         if (url.origin !== pageWindow.location.origin) throw new Error('Blocked an unexpected external financial-data URL.');

27550:         return { doc: new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html'), url: url.href };

00001: #!/usr/bin/env python3
00002: """Verify the executable and structural live mission requirements contract."""
00003: from __future__ import annotations
00004: 
00005: import json
00006: import re
00007: import subprocess
00008: from pathlib import Path
00009: 
00010: ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
00011: SOURCE = ROOT / "src/MissionChief_Map_Command_Toolkit.user.js"
00012: FIXTURE = ROOT / ".github/fixtures/mission-requirements-contract.json"
00013: RUNTIME_TEST = ROOT / ".github/scripts/test_mission_requirements_runtime.js"
00014: CUSTOM_VEHICLE_BADGES_CONTRACT = ROOT / ".github/scripts/test_custom_vehicle_badges_contract.py"
00015: CATALOGUE_FIXTURE = ROOT / ".github/fixtures/mission-catalogue-pages.json"
00016: REPORT_FORM = ROOT / ".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/mission-info-missing.yml"
00017: 
00018: 
00019: def main() -> int:
00020:     source = SOURCE.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
00021:     data = json.loads(FIXTURE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
00022:     catalogue_fixture = json.loads(CATALOGUE_FIXTURE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
00023:     assert len(catalogue_fixture["pages"]) >= 3
00024:     assert any(page.get("variations") for page in catalogue_fixture["pages"])
00025:     assert any(page.get("conditional") for page in catalogue_fixture["pages"])
00026: 
00027:     runtime = subprocess.run(["node", str(RUNTIME_TEST)], cwd=ROOT, text=True, capture_output=True)
00028:     if runtime.stdout:
00029:         print(runtime.stdout, end="")
00030:     if runtime.returncode != 0:
00031:         if runtime.stderr:
00032:             print(runtime.stderr, end="")
00033:         raise SystemExit("Mission requirements runtime fixtures failed")
00034:

00036:     if custom_badges.stdout:
00037:         print(custom_badges.stdout, end="")
00038:     if custom_badges.returncode != 0:
00039:         if custom_badges.stderr:
00040:             print(custom_badges.stderr, end="")
00041:         raise SystemExit("Custom Vehicle Badges contract failed")
00042:

00064:         "function missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate)",
00065:         "function missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source = null)",
00066:         "function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null)",
00067:         "function missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, node)",
00068:         "function missionRequirementsPlacePanel(candidate, source, panel)",
00069:         "function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = [])",
00070:         "function missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate)",
00071:         "function missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(kind)",
00072:         "function missionRequirementsReportUrl(record, reason = 'unknown')",
00073:         "function missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(candidate)",
00074:         "function missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(doc, descriptor = {})",
00075:         "function missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record)",
00076:         "function missionRequirementsCataloguePanelHtml(catalogue)",
00077:         "function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue)",
00078:         "Official MissionChief catalogue baseline only",
00079:         "/einsaetze/",
00080:         "Unable to pull mission requirements",
00081:         "data-mcms-report-mission",
00082:         "mission-info-missing.yml",
00083:         "diagnostic",
00084:         "issues/new",
00085:         "function missionRequirementsEnsureRecord(candidate, source)",
00086:         "data-mcms-requirements-panel",
00087:         "function observeMissionRequirementsDocument(doc)",
00088:         "function installMissionRequirementsWindows()",
00089:         "runtimeOnCleanup(() => {",
00090:         "missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate, source, panel)",
00091:         "missionRequirementsHideSource(source)",
00092:         "missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source)",
00093:         "#missing_text",
00094:         "#patient_button_form",
00095:         "#patient_button_text",
00096:         "#mission_vehicle_driving",
00097:         "#mission_vehicle_at_mission",
00098:         "#vehicle_show_table_body_all",
00099:         "#occupied",
00100:         ".vehicle_checkbox",
00101:         ".alert-missing-vehicles",
00102:         "scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35)",
00103:         "installMissionRequirementsWindows();",
00104:         "${makeToggleButton('missionRequirements'",
00105:         "missionRequirements: state.missionRequirements",
00106:         "Mission Requirements on",
00107:         "if (state.missionRequirements) scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);",
00108:         "const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();",
00109:     ]
00110:     compact_source = re.sub(r"\s+", "", source)
00111:     missing = [marker for marker in required_markers if marker not in source and re.sub(r"\s+", "", marker) not in compact_source]
00112:     assert not missing, f"Missing mission requirements contract markers: {missing}"
00113: 
00114:     report_form = REPORT_FORM.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
00115:     assert "labels:\n  - Mission Info Missing" in report_form
00116:     assert "id: diagnostic" in report_form
00117:     assert "required: true" in report_form
00118: 
00119:     assert source.count("function installMissionRequirementsWindows()") == 1
00120:     assert source.count("function scanMissionRequirementsWindows()") == 1
00121:     assert compact_source.count("missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate,source,panel)") == 2
00122:     assert source.count("missionRequirementsPanelId: 'mc-map-command-toolkit-mission-requirements'") == 1
00123:     assert "return { root, parent: operational.parentNode, before: operational };" not in source
00124:     assert "missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, operational)" not in source
00125:     assert "const operational = root.querySelector?." not in source
00126:     assert source.count("function missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate)") == 1
00127:     assert source.count("function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState)") == 1
00128:     assert "setInterval(" not in re.search(r"// Issue #181: patient-derived ambulance demand\.([\s\S]*?)function missionRequirementsVehicleType", source).group(1)
00129:     assert re.search(r"key:\s*['\"]ambulance['\"][^\n]*types:\s*\[5\]", source), "patient demand must use the conservative UK transport ambulance mapping"
00130: 
00131:     for alias in data["requiredAliases"]:
00132:         assert alias in source, f"Required UK requirement alias missing: {alias}"
00133:     for label, vehicle_types in data["requiredVehicleTypes"].items():
00134:         for vehicle_type in vehicle_types:
00135:             assert re.search(rf"types:\s*\[[^\]]*\b{vehicle_type}\b", source), f"{label}: vehicle type {vehicle_type} is absent"
00136: 
00137:     css = re.search(r"function missionRequirementsDocumentCss\(\) \{([\s\S]*?)\n    \}\n\n    function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle", source)
00138:     assert css, "Mission requirements document CSS helper is missing"
00139:     compact_css = re.sub(r"\s+", "", css.group(1)).lower()
00140:     panel_rule = compact_css.split(".mcms-req-head", 1)[0]
00141:     for forbidden in data["layout"]["forbiddenNormalPanelPositioning"]:
00142:         assert forbidden not in panel_rule, f"normal requirements panel must not use {forbidden}"
00143:     assert "position:relative!important" in panel_rule
00144:     assert "clear:both!important" in panel_rule
00145:     assert data["layout"]["mobileBreakpoint"].replace(" ", "") in compact_css
00146:     assert "grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))" in compact_css
00147:     assert "table-layout:fixed!important" in compact_css
00148:     assert "overflow-wrap:anywhere!important" in compact_css
00149:     assert f"width:min(100%,{data['layout']['standardDesktopWidth']})!important" in compact_css
00150:     assert f'data-width-mode="wide"]{{width:min(100%,{data["layout"]["wideDesktopWidth"]})!important' in compact_css
00151:     assert 'data-width-mode="fluid"]{width:100%!important' in compact_css
00152: 
00153:     lssm = re.search(r"function missionRequirementsLssmActive\(candidate, source\) \{([\s\S]*?)\n    \}", source)
00154:     assert lssm and ".alert-missing-vehicles" in lssm.group(1)
00155:     assert "table.table-striped.table-condensed" not in lssm.group(1)
00156: 
00157:     print("Mission requirements contract passed")
00158:     return 0
00159: 
00160: 
00161: if __name__ == "__main__":
00162:     raise SystemExit(main())

===== FILE .github/scripts/test_mission_requirements_runtime.js =====
00001: #!/usr/bin/env node
00002: 'use strict';
00003: 
00004: const assert = require('assert');
00005: const fs = require('fs');
00006: const path = require('path');
00007: const vm = require('vm');
00008: 
00009: const root = path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..');
00010: const source = fs.readFileSync(path.join(root, 'src', 'MissionChief_Map_Command_Toolkit.user.js'), 'utf8');
00011: const fixture = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(root, '.github', 'fixtures', 'mission-requirements-contract.json'), 'utf8'));
00012: const catalogueFixture = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(root, '.github', 'fixtures', 'mission-catalogue-pages.json'), 'utf8'));
00013: const startMarker = '    // Issue #133 clean-room live mission requirements matrix.';
00014: const endMarker = '    function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {';
00015: const start = source.indexOf(startMarker);
00016: const end = source.indexOf(endMarker, start);
00017: assert(start >= 0 && end > start, 'unable to extract Issue #133 runtime block');
00018: const block = source.slice(start, end);
00019: 
00020: const escapeHtml = value => String(value ?? '')
00021:     .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
00022:     .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
00023:     .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
00024:     .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
00025:     .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
00026: 
00027: class FakeClassList {
00028:     constructor() { this.values = new Set(); }
00029:     contains(value) { return this.values.has(value); }
00030:     toggle(value, force) {
00031:         const enabled = force === undefined ? !this.values.has(value) : Boolean(force);
00032:         if (enabled) this.values.add(value);
00033:         else this.values.delete(value);
00034:         return enabled;
00035:     }
00036: }
00037: 
00038: class FakeElement {
00039:     constructor(tagName = 'div', ownerDocument = null) {
00040:         this.tagName = String(tagName).toUpperCase();
00041:         this.ownerDocument = ownerDocument;
00042:         this.dataset = {};
00043:         this.attributes = new Map();
00044:         this.classList = new FakeClassList();
00045:         this.children = [];
00046:         this.parentNode = null;
00047:         this.isConnected = true;
00048:         this.textContent = '';
00049:         this.innerText = '';
00050:         this.innerHTML = '';
00051:         this.id = '';
00052:         this.className = '';
00053:         this.hidden = false;
00054:         this.value = '';
00055:         this.listeners = new Map();
00056:         this.matchSet = new Set();
00057:         this.queryMap = new Map();
00058:         this.queryAllMap = new Map();
00059:         this.queryHandler = null;
00060:         this.queryAllHandler = null;
00061:         this.closestMap = new Map();
00062:     }
00063:     get firstChild() { return this.children[0] || null; }
00064:     get nextSibling() { const index = this.parentNode?.children?.indexOf(this) ?? -1; return index >= 0 ? (this.parentNode.children[index + 1] || null) : null; }
00065:     setAttribute(name, value) {
00066:         this.attributes.set(name, String(value));
00067:         if (name === 'id') this.id = String(value);
00068:     }
00069:     removeAttribute(name) {
00070:         this.attributes.delete(name);
00071:         if (name === 'id') this.id = '';
00072:     }
00073:     getAttribute(name) {
00074:         if (name === 'data-raw-html' && this._lssmActive) {
00075:             return '<div data-requirement-type="personnel">Missing Personnel</div>';
00076:         }
00077:         if (name === 'id') return this.id || null;
00078:         return this.attributes.has(name) ? this.attributes.get(name) : null;
00079:     }
00080:     matches(selector) { return this.matchSet.has(selector); }
00081:     querySelector(selector) {
00082:         if (this.queryHandler) {
00083:             const value = this.queryHandler(selector);
00084:             if (value !== undefined) return value;
00085:         }
00086:         return this.queryMap.get(selector) || null;
00087:     }
00088:     querySelectorAll(selector) {
00089:         if (this.queryAllHandler) {
00090:             const value = this.queryAllHandler(selector);
00091:             if (value !== undefined) return value;
00092:         }
00093:         return this.queryAllMap.get(selector) || [];
00094:     }
00095:     closest(selector) { return this.closestMap.get(selector) || null; }
00096:     addEventListener(type, listener) {
00097:         const listeners = this.listeners.get(type) || [];
00098:         listeners.push(listener);
00099:         this.listeners.set(type, listeners);
00100:     }
00101:     appendChild(child) {
00102:         child.parentNode = this;
00103:         child.ownerDocument ||= this.ownerDocument;
00104:         child.isConnected = true;
00105:         this.children.push(child);
00106:         child.ownerDocument?.nodes.add(child);
00107:         return child;
00108:     }
00109:     insertBefore(child, reference) {
00110:         if (child.parentNode) child.parentNode.children = child.parentNode.children.filter(item => item !== child);
00111:         child.parentNode = this;
00112:         child.ownerDocument ||= this.ownerDocument;
00113:         child.isConnected = true;
00114:         const index = this.children.indexOf(reference);
00115:         if (index >= 0) this.children.splice(index, 0, child);
00116:         else this.children.push(child);
00117:         child.ownerDocument?.nodes.add(child);
00118:         return child;
00119:     }
00120:     contains(node) {
00121:         if (this === node) return true;
00122:         return this.children.some(child => child.contains?.(node));
00123:     }
00124:     remove() {
00125:         this.isConnected = false;
00126:         if (this.parentNode) this.parentNode.children = this.parentNode.children.filter(child => child !== this);
00127:         this.ownerDocument?.nodes.delete(this);
00128:     }
00129: }
00130: 
00131: class FakeDocument {
00132:     constructor() {
00133:         this.nodes = new Set();
00134:         this.documentElement = new FakeElement('html', this);
00135:         this.head = new FakeElement('head', this);
00136:         this.body = new FakeElement('body', this);
00137:         this.defaultView = null;
00138:         this.nodes.add(this.documentElement);
00139:         this.nodes.add(this.head);
00140:         this.nodes.add(this.body);
00141:     }
00142:     createElement(tagName) { return new FakeElement(tagName, this); }
00143:     getElementById(id) { return Array.from(this.nodes).find(node => node.isConnected && node.id === id) || null; }
00144:     querySelectorAll(selector) {
00145:         if (selector === 'iframe, frame') return [];
00146:         if (selector.startsWith('#')) {
00147:             const node = this.getElementById(selector.slice(1));
00148:             return node ? [node] : [];
00149:         }
00150:         if (selector === '[data-mcms-requirements-source-hidden="1"]') {
00151:             return Array.from(this.nodes).filter(node => node.isConnected && node.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1');
00152:         }
00153:         return [];
00154:     }
00155: }
00156: 
00157: class FakeMutationObserver {
00158:     static created = 0;
00159:     constructor(callback) {
00160:         this.callback = callback;
00161:         this.connected = false;
00162:         FakeMutationObserver.created += 1;
00163:     }
00164:     observe() { this.connected = true; }
00165:     disconnect() { this.connected = false; }
00166: }
00167: 
00168: let candidates = [];
00169: let documentContexts = [];
00170: let animationQueue = [];
00171: let nextAnimationId = 1;
00172: const trackedObservers = new Set();
00173: const listenedEvents = [];
00174: const openedUrls = [];
00175: const flushAnimationFrames = () => {
00176:     while (animationQueue.length) {
00177:         const queue = animationQueue;
00178:         animationQueue = [];
00179:         for (const item of queue) item.callback();
00180:     }
00181: };
00182: 
00183: const context = {
00184:     console,
00185:     escapeHtml,
00186:     SCRIPT: {
00187:         missionRequirementsPanelId: 'mc-map-command-toolkit-mission-requirements',

00193:     URLSearchParams,
00194:     document: {},
00195:     MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver,

00200:     missionRequirementsObservedFrames: new WeakSet(),

00204:     runtimeRequestAnimationFrame: callback => {
00205:         const id = nextAnimationId++;
00206:         animationQueue.push({ id, callback });
00207:         return id;
00208:     },
00209:     runtimeCancelAnimationFrame: id => { animationQueue = animationQueue.filter(item => item.id !== id); },
00210:     runtimeTrackObserver: observer => { trackedObservers.add(observer); return observer; },
00211:     runtimeUntrackObserver: observer => { observer?.disconnect?.(); trackedObservers.delete(observer); },
00212:     runtimeListen: (target, type, listener, options) => { listenedEvents.push({ target, type, listener, options }); },
00213:     runtimeOnCleanup: () => {},
00214:     transportSweepDocumentContexts: () => Array.from(new Set([...(documentContexts || []), ...candidates.map(candidate => candidate.root?.ownerDocument).filter(Boolean)])).map(doc => ({ doc })),
00215:     missionValueWindowCandidates: () => candidates,
00216:     mutationTouchesSelector: () => false,

00381:         { key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: 1, group: 'vehicles', definition: {} },
00382:         { min: 1, max: 1, known: true },
00383:         { min: 0, max: 0, known: true }
00384:     )
00385: ], []);
00386: for (const header of fixture.layout.requiredHeaders) assert(html.html.includes(header), `missing table header: ${header}`);
00387: assert.strictEqual(html.stateName, 'success', 'covered panel state');
00388: 
00389: const css = api.documentCss().replace(/\s+/g, '').toLowerCase();
00390: const normalPanelRule = css.split('.mcms-req-head', 1)[0];
00391: for (const forbidden of fixture.layout.forbiddenNormalPanelPositioning) {
00392:     assert(!normalPanelRule.includes(forbidden), `normal-flow panel contains ${forbidden}`);
00393: }
00394: assert(normalPanelRule.includes('position:relative!important'), 'normal-flow panel must be relative');
00395: assert(normalPanelRule.includes('[data-mcms-requirements-source-hidden="1"]{display:none!important}'), 'native source hiding must be CSS-owned');
00396: assert(css.includes('@media(max-width:767px)'), 'mobile breakpoint missing');
00397: assert(css.includes(`width:min(100%,${fixture.layout.standardDesktopWidth})!important`), 'standard width missing');
00398: assert(css.includes(`data-width-mode="wide"]{width:min(100%,${fixture.layout.wideDesktopWidth})!important`), 'wide width missing');
00399: assert(css.includes('data-width-mode="fluid"]{width:100%!important'), 'fluid width missing');
00400: 
00401: function makeVehicleElement(doc, vehicleId, typeId, options = {}) {
00402:     const row = new FakeElement('tr', doc);
00403:     const vehicle = new FakeElement('input', doc);
00404:     vehicle.value = String(vehicleId);
00405:     if (options.typeOnRow) row.setAttribute('vehicle_type_id', String(typeId));
00406:     else vehicle.setAttribute('vehicle_type_id', String(typeId));
00407:     if (options.tractiveId !== undefined) vehicle.setAttribute('tractive_vehicle_id', String(options.tractiveId));
00408:     if (options.staff !== undefined) vehicle.setAttribute('data-current-personnel', String(options.staff));
00409:     if (options.equipment) row.setAttribute('data-equipment-types', options.equipment.join(','));
00410:     vehicle.closestMap.set('tr', row);
00411:     row.queryHandler = selector => selector.includes('vehicle_type_id') ? (options.typeOnRow ? null : vehicle) : null;
00412:     row.queryAllHandler = () => [];
00413:     return { row, vehicle };
00414: }
00415: 
00416: function makeMissionCandidate(doc, requirementText = '1 Ambulance') {
00417:     const missionRoot = new FakeElement('div', doc);
00418:     const sourceNode = new FakeElement('div', doc);
00419:     sourceNode.id = 'missing_text';
00420:     sourceNode.innerText = requirementText;
00421:     sourceNode.textContent = requirementText;
00422:     sourceNode.queryAllHandler = selector => selector === '[data-requirement-type]' ? [] : [];
00423:     sourceNode.queryHandler = selector => sourceNode._lssmActive && selector.includes('.alert-missing-vehicles') ? new FakeElement('div', doc) : null;
00424:     sourceNode.matches = selector => sourceNode._lssmActive && selector === '.alert-missing-vehicles';
00425:     missionRoot.appendChild(sourceNode);
00426:     missionRoot.selectedUnits = [];
00427:     missionRoot.enRouteRows = [];
00428:     missionRoot.onSiteRows = [];
00429:     missionRoot.patientForm = null;
00430:     missionRoot.patientText = null;
00431:     missionRoot.queryHandler = selector => {
00432:         if (selector === '#missing_text') return sourceNode.isConnected ? sourceNode : null;
00433:         if (selector === '#patient_button_form') return missionRoot.patientForm?.isConnected === false ? null : missionRoot.patientForm;
00434:         if (selector === '#patient_button_text') return missionRoot.patientText?.isConnected === false ? null : missionRoot.patientText;
00435:         if (selector === '[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]') return missionRoot.children.find(child => child.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') || null;
00436:         if (selector.includes('.alert-missing-vehicles')) return sourceNode._lssmActive ? sourceNode : null;
00437:         return null;
00438:     };
00439:     missionRoot.queryAllHandler = selector => {
00440:         if (selector.includes('.vehicle_checkbox')) return missionRoot.selectedUnits;
00441:         if (selector === '#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr') return missionRoot.enRouteRows;
00442:         if (selector === '#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr') return missionRoot.onSiteRows;
00443:         if (selector === 'iframe, frame') return [];
00444:         return [];
00445:     };
00446:     return { root: missionRoot, mount: missionRoot, source: sourceNode };
00447: }
00448: 
00449: function makeMissionCandidateWithoutSource(doc) {
00450:     const missionRoot = new FakeElement('form', doc);
00451:     missionRoot.setAttribute('action', '/missions/9901');
00452:     missionRoot.matchSet.add('form[action*="/missions/"]');
00453:     missionRoot.selectedUnits = [];
00454:     missionRoot.enRouteRows = [];
00455:     missionRoot.onSiteRows = [];
00456:     missionRoot.patientForm = null;
00457:     missionRoot.patientText = null;
00458:     missionRoot.queryHandler = selector => {
00459:         if (selector === '#missing_text') return missionRoot.children.find(child => child.id === 'missing_text' && child.isConnected) || null;
00460:         if (selector === '#patient_button_form') return missionRoot.patientForm?.isConnected === false ? null : missionRoot.patientForm;
00461:         if (selector === '#patient_button_text') return missionRoot.patientText?.isConnected === false ? null : missionRoot.patientText;
00462:         if (selector === '[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]') return missionRoot.children.find(child => child.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' && child.isConnected) || null;
00463:         return null;
00464:     };
00465:     missionRoot.queryAllHandler = selector => {
00466:         if (selector.includes('.vehicle_checkbox')) return missionRoot.selectedUnits;
00467:         if (selector === '#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr') return missionRoot.enRouteRows;
00468:         if (selector === '#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr') return missionRoot.onSiteRows;
00469:         return [];
00470:     };
00471:     return { root: missionRoot, mount: missionRoot };
00472: }

00496:     return null;
00497: };

00655: const transitionRoot = new FakeElement('div', transitionDoc);
00656: transitionRoot.queryAllMap.set('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]', [{ getAttribute(name) { return name === 'href' ? '/einsaetze/202' : null; } }]);
00657: const transitionSource = new FakeElement('div', transitionDoc);

00670: const unitDoc = new FakeDocument();
00671: unitDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver };
00672: const unitCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(unitDoc, '2 Ambulances');
00673: const firstAmbulance = makeVehicleElement(unitDoc, 101, 5);
00674: const secondAmbulance = makeVehicleElement(unitDoc, 102, 5);
00675: const ambulanceDefinition = api.definitions.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance');
00676: const ambulanceParsed = {
00677:     requirements: [{ key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: 2, group: 'vehicles', definition: ambulanceDefinition }],
00678:     unresolved: []
00679: };
00680: const ambulanceCatalogue = { requirements: [{ key: 'ambulance', baseline: 2, missing: 2 }] };
00681: unitCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [firstAmbulance.vehicle];
00682: let resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00683: assert.strictEqual(resolved.requiredText, '2', 'catalogue baseline supplies total required capacity');
00684: assert.strictEqual(resolved.selectedMin, 1, 'selected vehicle is counted');
00685: assert.strictEqual(resolved.stillNeededText, '1', 'selected capacity immediately reduces still needed');
00686: 
00687: unitCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [firstAmbulance.vehicle, secondAmbulance.vehicle];
00688: resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00689: assert.strictEqual(resolved.stillNeededText, '0', 'second selected vehicle fulfils the requirement');
00690: assert.strictEqual(resolved.covered, true, 'selected vehicles can produce a green fulfilled row');
00691: 
00692: unitCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [firstAmbulance.vehicle];
00693: unitCandidate.root.enRouteRows = [secondAmbulance.row];
00694: resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00695: assert.strictEqual(resolved.respondingMin, 1, 'dispatch moves capacity into responding');
00696: assert.strictEqual(resolved.stillNeededText, '0', 'selected to responding transition preserves fulfilment');
00697: 
00698: unitCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [firstAmbulance.vehicle, secondAmbulance.vehicle];
00699: resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00700: assert.strictEqual(resolved.selectedMin, 1, 'same vehicle visible as selected and responding is not double-counted');
00701: assert.strictEqual(resolved.respondingMin, 1, 'responding bucket takes precedence during DOM transition');
00702: 
00703: unitCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [firstAmbulance.vehicle];
00704: unitCandidate.root.enRouteRows = [];
00705: unitCandidate.root.onSiteRows = [secondAmbulance.row];
00706: ambulanceParsed.requirements[0].missing = 1;
00707: resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00708: assert.strictEqual(resolved.onSiteMin, 1, 'arrival moves capacity into on-site');
00709: assert.strictEqual(resolved.respondingMin, 0, 'arrived unit leaves responding');
00710: assert.strictEqual(resolved.stillNeededText, '0', 'responding to on-site transition preserves fulfilment');
00711: 
00712: unitCandidate.root.onSiteRows = [];
00713: ambulanceParsed.requirements[0].missing = 2;
00714: resolved = api.resolve(unitCandidate, ambulanceParsed, ambulanceCatalogue)[0];
00715: assert.strictEqual(resolved.onSiteMin, 0, 'unit removal is reconciled');
00716: assert.strictEqual(resolved.stillNeededText, '1', 'shortage returns when capacity leaves the mission');
00717: 
00718: const personnelDoc = new FakeDocument();
00719: personnelDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver };
00720: const personnelCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(
00721:     personnelDoc,
00722:     'Missing Personnel: 8x Level 1 Public Order Officer, 22x Level 2 Public Order Officer'
00723: );
00724: const personnelParsed = api.parseSource(personnelCandidate.source);
00725: assert.deepStrictEqual(
00726:     JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(personnelParsed.requirements.map(item => ({ key: item.key, missing: item.missing, group: item.group })))),
00727:     [
00728:         { key: 'public-order-level-1', missing: 8, group: 'staff' },
00729:         { key: 'public-order-level-2', missing: 22, group: 'staff' }
00730:     ],
00731:     'unstructured Missing Personnel banner is inferred as staff and parsed in source order'
00732: );
00733: const publicOrderRows = api.resolve(personnelCandidate, personnelParsed);
00734: assert(publicOrderRows.every(row => row.uncertain && row.selectedText === '?' && row.enRouteText === '?'), 'unmapped role capacity remains safely uncertain');
00735: 
00736: const genericCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(personnelDoc, 'Missing Personnel: 3x Specialist Evidence Officer');
00737: const genericParsed = api.parseSource(genericCandidate.source);
00738: assert.strictEqual(genericParsed.requirements.length, 1, 'unknown quantified requirement becomes a visible table row');
00739: assert.strictEqual(genericParsed.requirements[0].requirement, 'Specialist Evidence Officer', 'unknown requirement label is preserved');
00740: assert.strictEqual(genericParsed.requirements[0].missing, 3, 'unknown requirement quantity is preserved');
00741: assert.strictEqual(api.resolve(genericCandidate, genericParsed)[0].uncertain, true, 'unknown requirement cannot become falsely covered');
00742: 
00743: 
00744: {
00745: function attachPatientSummary(candidate, totalText, detailText = '') {
00746:     const doc = candidate.root.ownerDocument;
00747:     const form = new FakeElement('div', doc);
00748:     form.id = 'patient_button_form';
00749:     const text = new FakeElement('span', doc);
00750:     text.id = 'patient_button_text';
00751:     const strong = new FakeElement('strong', doc);
00752:     strong.textContent = strong.innerText = String(totalText || '');
00753:     text.textContent = text.innerText = `${totalText || ''}${detailText ? ` - ${detailText}` : ''}`;
00754:     text.queryMap.set('strong', strong);
00755:     form.queryMap.set('#patient_button_text strong, strong', strong);
00756:     form.queryMap.set('#patient_button_text', text);
00757:     candidate.root.patientForm = form;
00758:     candidate.root.patientText = text;
00759:     candidate.root.appendChild(form);
00760:     form.appendChild(text);
00761:     text.appendChild(strong);
00762:     return { form, text, strong };
00763: }
00764: 
00765: const patientDoc = new FakeDocument();
00766: patientDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver, location: { pathname: '/missions/18101' } };
00767: const patientCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(patientDoc, '');
00768: patientCandidate.missionId = 18101;
00769: const patientNodes = attachPatientSummary(patientCandidate, '1 Patient', '1 Untreated patients');
00770: let patientState = api.patientCount(patientCandidate);
00771: assert.deepStrictEqual(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify({ present: patientState.present, known: patientState.known, count: patientState.count, source: patientState.source })), {
00772:     present: true, known: true, count: 1, source: 'patient-total-strong'
00773: }, 'singular patient total is read from the strong summary rather than untreated text');
00774: 
00775: patientNodes.strong.textContent = patientNodes.strong.innerText = '3 Patients';
00776: patientNodes.text.textContent = patientNodes.text.innerText = '3 Patients - 1 Untreated patients';
00777: patientState = api.patientCount(patientCandidate);
00778: assert.strictEqual(patientState.count, 3, 'plural patient total is parsed');
00779: let reconciledPatients = api.reconcilePatientDemand({ requirements: [], unresolved: [] }, patientState);
00780: assert.strictEqual(reconciledPatients.requirements.length, 1, 'patient-only mission creates one requirement row');
00781: assert.strictEqual(reconciledPatients.requirements[0].key, 'ambulance', 'patient demand creates the Ambulance row');
00782: assert.strictEqual(reconciledPatients.requirements[0].patientRequired, 3, 'one ambulance is required per patient');
00783: assert.strictEqual(reconciledPatients.requirements[0].requirementSource, 'Patients', 'patient source is retained for the UI');
00784: 
00785: let patientResolved = api.resolve(patientCandidate, reconciledPatients)[0];
00786: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.requiredText, '3', 'patient-only demand sets exact required capacity');
00787: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.stillNeededText, '3', 'three patients with no ambulances need three');
00788: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.definitelyOpen, true, 'uncovered patient demand keeps the matrix red');
00789: 
00790: const patientOnSite = makeVehicleElement(patientDoc, 18111, 5);
00791: const patientResponding = makeVehicleElement(patientDoc, 18112, 5);
00792: const patientSelected = makeVehicleElement(patientDoc, 18113, 5);
00793: patientCandidate.root.onSiteRows = [patientOnSite.row];
00794: patientCandidate.root.enRouteRows = [patientResponding.row];
00795: patientCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [patientSelected.vehicle];
00796: patientResolved = api.resolve(patientCandidate, reconciledPatients)[0];
00797: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.onSiteText, '1', 'on-site ambulance capacity is counted');
00798: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.respondingText, '1', 'responding ambulance capacity is counted');
00799: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.selectedText, '1', 'selected ambulance capacity is counted separately');
00800: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.stillNeededText, '0', 'committed and selected ambulances cover patient demand');
00801: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.covered, true, 'covered patient demand allows a green row');
00802: 
00803: const patientAmbulanceDefinition = api.definitions.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance');
00804: const statedLower = {
00805:     requirements: [{ key: 'ambulance', requirement: 'Ambulance', missing: 1, group: 'vehicles', definition: patientAmbulanceDefinition }],
00806:     unresolved: []
00807: };
00808: const mergedDemand = api.reconcilePatientDemand(statedLower, patientState);
00809: assert.strictEqual(mergedDemand.requirements.filter(item => item.key === 'ambulance').length, 1, 'stated and patient demand never duplicate the Ambulance row');
00810: assert.strictEqual(mergedDemand.requirements[0].missing, 1, 'stated missing quantity is retained for live reconstruction');
00811: assert.strictEqual(mergedDemand.requirements[0].patientRequired, 3, 'patient total remains the minimum authoritative requirement');
00812: patientCandidate.root.onSiteRows = [];
00813: patientCandidate.root.enRouteRows = [];
00814: patientCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [];
00815: patientResolved = api.resolve(patientCandidate, mergedDemand)[0];
00816: assert.strictEqual(patientResolved.requiredText, '3', 'lower stated requirement does not reduce patient-derived demand');
00817: 
00818: patientNodes.strong.textContent = patientNodes.strong.innerText = '0 Patients';
00819: patientNodes.text.textContent = patientNodes.text.innerText = '0 Patients - 0 Untreated patients';
00820: const zeroState = api.patientCount(patientCandidate);
00821: assert.strictEqual(api.reconcilePatientDemand({ requirements: [], unresolved: [] }, zeroState).requirements.length, 0, 'zero patients create no synthetic ambulance row');
00822: 
00823: patientNodes.strong.textContent = patientNodes.strong.innerText = '';
00824: patientNodes.text.textContent = patientNodes.text.innerText = 'Patient details loading';
00825: const unknownState = api.patientCount(patientCandidate);
00826: assert.strictEqual(unknownState.known, false, 'present but unparseable patient summary is unknown');
00827: const unknownDemand = api.reconcilePatientDemand({ requirements: [], unresolved: [] }, unknownState);
00828: assert.strictEqual(unknownDemand.requirements.length, 1, 'unknown patient total still creates a guarded Ambulance row');
00829: assert.strictEqual(unknownDemand.unresolved.length, 1, 'unknown patient total is visible as unresolved');
00830: const unknownResolved = api.resolve(patientCandidate, unknownDemand)[0];
00831: assert.strictEqual(unknownResolved.uncertain, true, 'unknown patient total cannot become covered');

00880: const policeDoc = new FakeDocument();
00881: policeDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver };
00882: const policeCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(policeDoc, '2 Police cars');
00883: const firstPolice = makeVehicleElement(policeDoc, 301, 8, { typeOnRow: true });
00884: const duplicateFirstPolice = makeVehicleElement(policeDoc, 301, 8, { typeOnRow: true });
00885: const secondPolice = makeVehicleElement(policeDoc, 302, 8, { typeOnRow: true });

00887: const policeDefinition = api.definitions.find(definition => definition.key === 'police-car');

00889:     requirements: [{ key: 'police-car', requirement: 'Police Car', missing: 2, group: 'vehicles', definition: policeDefinition }],
00890:     unresolved: []
00891: };

00895: assert.strictEqual(policeResolved.covered, false, 'one selected police car does not cover two required');

00898: assert.strictEqual(policeResolved.selectedMin, 2, 'selecting a second unique police car updates Selected to two');
00899: assert.strictEqual(policeResolved.covered, true, 'two selected police cars cover two required');
00900: policeCandidate.root.selectedUnits = [secondPolice.vehicle];
00901: policeResolved = api.resolve(policeCandidate, policeParsed)[0];
00902: assert.strictEqual(policeResolved.selectedMin, 1, 'deselecting one police car updates Selected back to one');
00903: 
00904: 
00905: 
00906: function makeCatalogueDocument(page) {
00907:     const sectionNames = {
00908:         reward: 'Reward and Precondition',
00909:         requirements: 'Vehicle and Personnel Requirements',
00910:         other: 'Other information'
00911:     };
00912:     const tables = Object.entries(page.sections).map(([key, entries]) => {
00913:         const rows = [[sectionNames[key], 'Value'], ...entries].map(values => ({
00914:             querySelectorAll(selector) {
00915:                 if (selector !== 'th, td') return [];
00916:                 return values.map(text => ({ textContent: String(text), innerText: String(text) }));
00917:             }
00918:         }));
00919:         return {
00920:             textContent: [sectionNames[key], 'Value', ...entries.flat()].join(' '),
00921:             innerText: [sectionNames[key], 'Value', ...entries.flat()].join(' '),
00922:             querySelectorAll(selector) { return selector === 'tr' ? rows : []; }
00923:         };
00924:     });
00925:     const links = (page.variations || []).map(item => ({
00926:         textContent: item.title,
00927:         innerText: item.title,
00928:         getAttribute(name) { return name === 'href' ? item.href : null; }
00929:     }));
00930:     return {
00931:         querySelector(selector) {
00932:             return selector.includes('h1') ? { textContent: page.title, innerText: page.title } : null;
00933:         },
00934:         querySelectorAll(selector) {
00935:             if (selector === 'table') return tables;
00936:             if (selector === 'a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') return links;
00937:             return [];
00938:         }
00939:     };
00940: }
00941: 
00942: const parsedCatalogues = new Map();
00943: for (const page of catalogueFixture.pages) {
00944:     const descriptor = { id: page.id, overlayIndex: page.overlayIndex ?? null, path: `/einsaetze/${page.id}`, url: page.sourceUrl };
00945:     const catalogue = api.parseCatalogueDocument(makeCatalogueDocument(page), descriptor);
00946:     parsedCatalogues.set(page.name, catalogue);
00947:     assert.strictEqual(catalogue.title, page.title, `${page.name}: title`);
00948:     const quantities = Object.fromEntries(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, item.baseline]));
00949:     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(page.expected)) assert.strictEqual(quantities[key], value, `${page.name}: ${key}`);
00950:     for (const [key, probability] of Object.entries(page.conditional || {})) {
00951:         assert.strictEqual(catalogue.requirements.find(item => item.key === key)?.probability, probability, `${page.name}: conditional probability`);
00952:     }
00953:     assert.strictEqual(catalogue.variations.length, (page.variations || []).length, `${page.name}: variations`);
00954: }
00955: 
00956: const simpleCatalogue = parsedCatalogues.get('simple fire mission');
00957: assert.strictEqual(simpleCatalogue.averageCredits, 110, 'catalogue average credits');
00958: assert(api.cataloguePanelHtml(simpleCatalogue).html.includes('Official MissionChief catalogue baseline only'), 'catalogue panel clearly marks baseline data');
00959: assert(!api.cataloguePanelHtml(simpleCatalogue).html.includes('Still needed'), 'catalogue baseline must not claim current still-needed quantities');
00960: const comparison = api.catalogueCompare({ requirements: [{ key: 'fire-engine', requirement: 'Fire Engine', missing: 2 }], unresolved: [] }, simpleCatalogue);
00961: assert.strictEqual(comparison.state, 'mismatch', 'live quantity above baseline is reported as a mismatch');
00962: 
00963: const descriptorDoc = new FakeDocument();
00964: descriptorDoc.defaultView = { location: { origin: 'https://www.missionchief.co.uk', protocol: 'https:', host: 'www.missionchief.co.uk' } };
00965: const descriptorRoot = new FakeElement('div', descriptorDoc);
00966: const descriptorLink = { getAttribute(name) { return name === 'href' ? '/einsaetze/34?overlay_index=2' : null; } };
00967: descriptorRoot.queryAllMap.set('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]', [descriptorLink]);
00968: const descriptor = api.catalogueDescriptor({ root: descriptorRoot, mount: descriptorRoot });
00969: assert.deepStrictEqual(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify({ id: descriptor.id, overlayIndex: descriptor.overlayIndex, path: descriptor.path })), { id: 34, overlayIndex: 2, path: '/einsaetze/34?overlay_index=2' }, 'catalogue descriptor preserves mission variation');
00970: 
00971: api.catalogueCacheStore('fixture-cache', simpleCatalogue, 1000);
00972: assert.strictEqual(api.catalogueCacheLookup('fixture-cache', 1001).stale, false, 'fresh catalogue cache');
00973: assert.strictEqual(api.catalogueCacheLookup('fixture-cache', 1000 + api.catalogueTtl + 1).stale, true, 'expired catalogue remains bounded stale fallback');
00974: assert.strictEqual(api.catalogueFailureFallback('fixture-cache', 1000 + api.catalogueTtl + 1).value.title, 'Bin fire', 'network failure reuses stale catalogue');
00975: assert.strictEqual(api.catalogueCacheLookup('fixture-cache', 1000 + api.catalogueStale + 1), null, 'catalogue cache expires after stale boundary');
00976: 
00977: const missingDoc = new FakeDocument();
00978: missingDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver, location: { pathname: '/missions/9901' }, navigator: context.pageWindow.navigator, innerWidth: 1280, innerHeight: 720 };
00979: const missingCandidate = makeMissionCandidateWithoutSource(missingDoc);
00980: candidates = [missingCandidate];

00985: const unsafeSource = new FakeElement('div', missingDoc);
00986: unsafeSource.id = 'missing_text';
00987: unsafeSource.textContent = 'token=secret https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1/abc 55.9533,-3.1883';
00988: unsafeSource.innerText = unsafeSource.textContent;
00989: missingCandidate.root.appendChild(unsafeSource);

00991: flushAnimationFrames();
00992: let missingRecord = Array.from(api.records.values())[0];
00993: assert(missingRecord, 'native source creates a record after source-less wait');
00994: const reportUrl = api.reportUrl(missingRecord, 'token=secret');
00995: assert(reportUrl.startsWith('https://github.com/Conroy1988/missionchief-toolkit-assets/issues/new?'), 'report uses the GitHub issue composer');
00996: const reportParams = new URL(reportUrl).searchParams;
00997: assert.strictEqual(reportParams.get('template'), 'mission-info-missing.yml', 'report selects the repository-owned Mission Info Missing form');
00998: assert.strictEqual(reportParams.get('labels'), null, 'report does not request permission-dependent labels');
00999: assert.strictEqual(reportParams.get('body'), null, 'report diagnostic uses the issue-form field rather than the blank issue body');
01000: assert(reportUrl.length <= 7600, 'report URL remains bounded');
01001: const reportBody = reportParams.get('diagnostic');
01002: assert(!reportBody.includes('secret'), 'report sanitises token values');
01003: assert(!reportBody.includes('discord.com/api/webhooks'), 'report sanitises webhook URLs');
01004: assert(!reportBody.includes('55.9533'), 'report sanitises coordinates');
01005:

01095: const lifecycleDoc = new FakeDocument();
01096: lifecycleDoc.defaultView = { MutationObserver: FakeMutationObserver };

01104: api.scan();

01106: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 1, 'repeated candidates in one document create one record');

01108: assert.strictEqual(lifecycleCandidate.source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden, '1', 'native source is hidden only while Toolkit owns the panel');
01109: const recordObserverCount = FakeMutationObserver.created;
01110: api.scan();
01111: flushAnimationFrames();
01112: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 1, 'repeated scans do not duplicate records');
01113: assert.strictEqual(FakeMutationObserver.created, recordObserverCount, 'repeated scans do not duplicate record observers');
01114: 
01115: const replacementCandidate = makeMissionCandidate(lifecycleDoc, '2 Fire engines');

01117: lifecycleCandidate.root.isConnected = false;

01121: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 1, 'mission-window replacement tears down the previous record');

01123: assert.strictEqual(replacementCandidate.source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden, '1', 'replacement mission source becomes owned');
01124: 
01125: replacementCandidate.source._lssmActive = true;
01126: api.scan();
01127: flushAnimationFrames();
01128: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 0, 'LSSM activation after Toolkit load removes the Toolkit panel');
01129: assert.strictEqual(replacementCandidate.source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden, undefined, 'LSSM takeover restores MissionChief source ownership');
01130: replacementCandidate.source._lssmActive = false;
01131: api.scan();
01132: flushAnimationFrames();

01134:

01137: lssmFirstCandidate.source._lssmActive = true;
01138: candidates = [lssmFirstCandidate];
01139: api.scan();
01140: flushAnimationFrames();
01141: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 0, 'LSSM-first load order suppresses the Toolkit panel');
01142: 
01143: context.state.missionRequirements = false;
01144: candidates = [replacementCandidate];
01145: api.scan();
01146: flushAnimationFrames();
01147: assert.strictEqual(api.records.size, 0, 'disabling the feature removes every panel and observer record');
01148: context.state.missionRequirements = true;
01149: assert(listenedEvents.filter(event => event.type === 'change').length === 1, 'delegated checkbox change listener is installed once');
01150: assert(trackedObservers.size >= 1, 'document lifecycle observer remains runtime-owned');
01151: 
01152: console.log('Mission requirements runtime fixtures passed');
